hyperedges.evidence: The full app icon combines warm gradient, sheen, and a central yen glyph to convey a travel expense or currency tracking product.

hyperedges.description: The favicon is composed from a purple bolt silhouette with internal masked glow layers.
Lavender, violet, and cyan blurred ellipses create a glossy energized gradient inside the mark.
The asset functions as a compact recognizable browser icon for the travel-expense app.

hyperedges.label: External Links Icon Set
Stacked App Interface Composition

hyperedges.summary: The SVG combines fixed display size, scalable viewBox geometry, centered aspect behavior, and cyan path fill to render the React logo as a compact UI icon.
Class metadata identifies the icon source/style while accessibility attributes hide the SVG despite its image role.
The primary purple bolt is enhanced by masked blurred ellipses that create Vite-style highlights.
The SVG is an accessible Vite logo asset with responsive parenthesis marks for light and dark color schemes.

attributes.purpose: application icon for travel expense or currency-focused expense tracking UI

attributes.visual_role: soft highlight across the icon surface

attributes.basis: central currency glyph plus app icon composition

nodes.label: Favicon SVG asset
nodes.description: Small browser/app icon rendered at 48 by 46 units with a compact brand-mark silhouette.

nodes.label: Lightning bolt logo shape
nodes.description: Primary angular path forms a stepped lightning or energy-bolt silhouette, suggesting speed, action, or powered travel workflow identity.

nodes.label: Purple base fill
nodes.description: Dominant #863bff fill establishes the main brand color for the favicon.

nodes.label: Alpha shape mask
nodes.description: Mask reuses the bolt outline so internal glow layers remain clipped inside the icon silhouette.

nodes.label: Blurred ellipse glows
nodes.description: Multiple filtered ellipses create soft internal lighting and dimensional gradients rather than flat color.

nodes.label: Light lavender highlights
nodes.description: #ede6ff glow ellipses add pale highlight bands inside the purple mark.

nodes.label: Deep violet shadows
nodes.description: #7e14ff ellipses reinforce saturated violet depth and contouring.

nodes.label: Cyan energy accents
nodes.description: #47bfff ellipses provide cool blue accent glows near the upper-right and lower-right areas.

nodes.label: Gaussian blur filters
nodes.description: Repeated feGaussianBlur filters soften ellipse edges to produce glossy, luminous gradients.

nodes.label: Travel Expense brand identity
nodes.description: The energetic bolt-like mark acts as a recognizable app favicon for the travel-expense interface.

nodes.label: React SVG asset
nodes.summary: Inline SVG asset representing the React logo for UI display.

nodes.label: SVG root element
nodes.summary: Root svg element defines namespaces, accessibility attributes, dimensions, aspect behavior, and viewBox.

nodes.label: React logo path
nodes.summary: Single path contains the full React atom logo geometry, including orbit shapes and central circle.

nodes.label: React cyan fill
nodes.summary: Brand-like cyan fill color applied to the React logo path.

nodes.label: Iconify logo classes
nodes.summary: Class names mark the asset as an Iconify logo icon.

nodes.label: Hidden image accessibility
nodes.summary: The SVG has aria-hidden true while also declaring role img.

nodes.label: Fixed icon dimensions
nodes.summary: SVG declares fixed rendered dimensions suitable for small UI icon placement.

nodes.label: ViewBox coordinate system
nodes.summary: Internal coordinate system used to scale the React logo geometry.

nodes.label: Centered aspect ratio
nodes.summary: Preserves aspect ratio and centers the icon within its viewport.

nodes.label: React atom visual motif
nodes.summary: The path geometry forms the recognizable React atom-like logo with elliptical loops around a center.

links.evidence: SVG includes full-size rounded rect background.
SVG includes second full-size rounded rect filled with sheen gradient.
SVG includes centered white text glyph for yen.
Background rect fill references url(#g).
Gold/orange currency-like palette supports financial app identity.
Currency symbol visually indicates money, expenses, or travel spending.
Root svg contains a primary path with an angular stepped outline.
Primary path fill is #863bff.
Mask path mirrors the bolt silhouette and masks the grouped ellipse layers.
The compact energetic silhouette is suitable for a favicon/app identity mark.
Glow ellipses appear inside a group using mask url(#a).
Ellipse groups reference filters containing feGaussianBlur.
Several ellipses use fill #ede6ff.
Several ellipses use fill #7e14ff.
Two ellipses use fill #47bfff.
Cool blue accent glows make the purple icon feel more dynamic and luminous.
The file content is a single svg root element.
The asset filename and SVG geometry identify it as the React logo.
The svg root contains one path element.
The svg has class="iconify iconify--logos".
The svg has aria-hidden="true" and role="img".
The svg has width="35.93" and height="32".
The svg has viewBox="0 0 256 228".
The svg has preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet".
The path has fill="#00D8FF".
The path data draws the React logo's orbital forms and central circle.
